transcript.clean_text: stage 8 - sure a Ducati shoot once more be the perfect playground for breakaway specialists and the great showdown of the favourites is expected on this ascent that has made its appearance on the Vuelta 20 years ago the high success rate of escape attempts so far encourages numerous riders to try the lock again today and after 35 kilometres 21 men managed to leave the pack behind amongst my Suzie Hernandez Juliana Filipe and Micah and Bachmann from Bowen school headwind high temperatures and heady terrain soon discouraged the pack and the hunt doesn't last the escapees pull away and 67 kilometres from arrival they have a lead of over five minutes while the peloton seems to keep resources for the final ascent at the race fronts Nelson Oliveira from Movistar 22nd at the stage certain Helen virtually takes the red jersey at Castilla right before the final ascent after 150 kilometres of teamwork the sir a Ducati will be the end of the escapees collaboration the men from bhava hands coy plan to launch Rafa mica on the slopes that can go up to 20 percent but Juliana Phillip resists and sticks to the polish further behind alberto contador also attacks us rivals as soon as it starts climbing the favorites follow and then chris froome attacks at mid ascent the british leaves all his rivals behind and raises his lead in the overall ranking he doesn't catch up to the escapees though and after resisting Mikus attacks the puncher are a few deep easily leads his fellow escapees behind on a sprint final and takes the stage it's the third success for Team quickstep this year on the last two kilometers of the descents Contador manages to catch up to Chris Froome and even passes the line ahead of his rival the Spaniard continues to work his way up after a difficult start this is probably the best way to forget the difficult month of July where he had to watch the Tour de France on television due to a knee injury Julianna Philippe is back with a bang and confirms that he is one of the strongest punchers in the pack after a great strategic race where the Frenchman patiently tired out of a FileMaker he takes the stage at sure a Ducati he is the successor of his compatriot David Micucci who had taken the stage here after a successful breakaway in 2010 I didn't expect that I will win the stage today for me it's a little bit complicated signs a three stage I feel not so so good but I feel it I think it for everybody the same after a long way similar it's the first stage win on a grand tour for the 25 year old Juliana Phillip who managed to resist the attack of young Polanco on the final kilometer behind flume and Contador fought an exciting battle and passed the line 15 seconds ahead of their rivals from now has a 28 second lead in the overall ranking one more effort tomorrow before it comes to the well-deserved first day off the stage on Sunday is again made for breakaway specialists after a rather leisurely start 130 kilometers along the seashore a second category ascent is on the menu the day off on a Costa Blanca will therefore be very welcome for the participants before part 2 of the welter 2017 begins you
